Held at the threshold of Beltane — a sacred time of renewal, rebirth and rising · Day Three opens with a Sunrise Circle on the beach, just two minutes from the venue

The Evening Before · Thursday 29th October

An Evening
Like No Other

Intimate VIP Cocktail Evening

Before the journey begins, a select group of women gather for an unforgettable evening at a carefully chosen Busselton venue — details revealed to ticket holders.

A special guest speaker. Welcome cocktails. The first beautiful exhale before three extraordinary days unfold. This is where the magic begins — where strangers become sisters before the sun has even risen on Day One.

✦ Exclusively for VIP Ticket Holders · 20 Places Only ✦

Your VIP Experience Includes

  • Intimate cocktail evening with special guest speaker — Thursday 29th October
  • All three days of Where Wild Hearts Bloom
  • Premium front of stage seating throughout the event
  • Exclusive opportunity to connect with and meet our guest speakers
  • A unique gift, exclusively designed for Where Wild Hearts Bloom
  • Welcome flowers, champagne and chocolates delivered to your room on arrival
  • One private online mindset and business strategy session with Jackie and Kaye — to be booked after the event
  • 20 places only — this experience will not be repeated

“A woman’s business can only grow
as far as her identity allows.”

In this space you are not just learning and thinking — you are expanding your identity.
You will enter as one version of yourself and leave as another —
with a bigger vision, expansive ideas and truly knowing what is absolutely possible for you.

When you expand your identity, your inner leader steps up —
excited, motivated and ready to create your legacy.

Hence — Where Wild Hearts Bloom.
The Calling

It takes a wild heart
to take the leap

Choosing the path of entrepreneurship is not for the faint-hearted. It takes a wild heart — one that is adventurous, courageous, and willing to keep beating strong through both the highs and the rebuilding.

Whether you are standing on the ledge of creating something extraordinary, navigating the beautiful chaos of growth, or feeling the quiet ache of a woman who has given everything to her business and needs to come home to herself — this gathering is for you.

Where Wild Hearts Bloom is a rare and intentional pause. Three days to step out of the demands of your business, back into the fullness of who you are, and forward into your next bold chapter — with clarity, confidence, and the deep knowledge that you are not alone.

This is not just a business event. It is a remembering.

This Is For You If…

Your wild heart is
calling you forward

In your entrepreneur journey you may be standing on the ledge of something extraordinary, deep in the daily grind of building something meaningful, or simply feeling the pull to pause and breathe — wherever you are, you belong here.

The Brave Beginner

You are on the threshold, feeling the electricity of possibility and the weight of the unknown. This gathering will give you the courage, clarity, and community to take that next step with your whole heart.

The Woman in Motion

You are in it — building, creating, leading. But somewhere in the doing, you have drifted from the feeling that started it all. This space will help you reignite the fire and remember why you began.

The Seasoned Leader

You have worked hard for years, built something remarkable, and given so much of yourself to your business. Now you are ready to pause, to breathe, to reflect — and to rediscover the woman beneath the leader. Here you will find deep connection, fresh inspiration, and the space to vision your next extraordinary season.

Sacred Timing

Held at the
threshold of Beltane

Our gathering falls at the threshold of Beltane — one of the most potent times in the ancient wheel of the year. A moment of letting go, of renewal, of rebirth. A time when the earth itself turns toward fullness.

There is no accident in the timing. When we gather at Beltane, we step into a current of transformation that has moved through women for thousands of years. We get to choose where we direct this current — into our businesses, our vision, and the lives we are boldly creating.

On Day Three, you will rise before the sun and walk two minutes to the beach for a Sacred Sunrise Circle at the water’s edge — to honour what you are releasing, and welcome what is blooming within you.

The Experience

For the woman
behind it all

Each day is intentionally curated to support you in your journey as a woman who followed the pull of her wild heart — moving you from arrival and openness, through activation, ceremony and inspired strategy, into a new level of identity, so you can take bold action and step powerfully into your next greatest season.

01

Arrive & Open

Awakening — Questioning conditioning and reconnecting to truth Friday 30th October

A day of awakening and self-discovery, inviting you to question thoughts of ‘I can’t’ and reconnect with your inner strength and truth, as you cross the threshold into new possibilities.

  • Welcome to Country
  • Heart Activation
  • Powerful Energy Flow
  • Beyond the Myth
  • Moving Beyond
  • Reflection & Provocation
  • Standing in the Story
  • Whose Voice Is This?
Included: Morning tea · Lunch · Afternoon tea
Dinner — your choice, on site or explore beautiful Busselton (7 min drive)
02

Rise & Ignite

Expansion — Identity growth, visibility, leadership and capacity Saturday 31st October

A day of powerful growth and identity expansion, designed to ignite the entrepreneurial flame within you as your wild heart begins to bloom.

  • Grounding & Energy
  • Stand in Your Sovereignty
  • The Space Between
  • Think Outside the Box
  • From Small Acorns Big Oaks Grow
  • Be Heard, Be Seen
  • Identity Shift
  • Layer by Layer
Evening
  • Release & Renew — Cacao Ceremony
  • Transformative Meditation
Included: Morning tea · Afternoon tea · Celebration Dinner together
Lunch — your choice, explore Busselton or dine on site
03

Integrate & Bloom

Integration & Launch — Visionary Entrepreneurship and bold action Sunday 1st November · Finish approx. 3pm

A day of integration and visionary leadership, designed to help you move forward with renewed clarity, confidence and energy into your next powerful season in business and life.

  • Sacred Sunrise Circle on the beach
  • Roots and Wings
  • Rising Above
  • Your Vision
  • Voices into Life
Included: Morning tea
Lunch — your choice · We finish around 3pm — changed, connected, and ready
Featured Speakers

Women who will move you

We are curating an extraordinary lineup of women whose stories, wisdom and courage will inspire you long after you leave Busselton. Each speaker has been chosen not just for what they have achieved — but for how deeply they have lived. Women who will motivate and inspire you, lift your vision and send you back into your journey with fresh fire in your belly.

✦

Speaker Announcements Coming Soon

Our featured speakers are being confirmed and we cannot wait to introduce them to you. Each announcement will be shared first with our community — follow us on social media to be the first to know.

What we can tell you — these are women whose stories will stop you in your tracks. Women who have built, rebuilt, risen and bloomed. Women who know what it truly means to lead from a wild heart.

The Setting

A venue as beautiful
as the work we do within it

Nestled on the stunning Busselton coastline of Western Australia, our resort venue is an experience in itself. Grand atrium spaces flooded with natural light, a heated indoor pool, beautiful resort grounds and lake, elegant dining, and — just two minutes on foot — one of the most breathtaking stretches of beach in the country.

A special resort discount code is available for all ticket holders to book their accommodation directly with the resort.

Accommodation is self-booked directly with the resort — an exclusive discount code will be provided to all ticket holders upon registration.

Just Two Minutes Away

The Sunrise
Circle

Two minutes from your door lies one of Western Australia’s most pristine coastlines. On the final morning, before the world wakes, you will walk to the water’s edge for a sacred Sunrise Circle — barefoot in the sand, held by the energy of the women standing with you, watching the light return.

With the power of the breath, the ocean and the energy of the women standing with you, you will tap into your inner power and connect with your deepest vision. Learn to trust. Learn to lean in. Open your wild heart to the truest, most powerful version of yourself.

3Transformational Days
2′Walk to the Ocean
1Beautiful New Aligned You
Every Detail Considered

Beautifully nourished
in every way

From your first morning coffee poolside to the celebration dinner that closes Day Two — every moment is designed to make you feel held, celebrated, and deeply cared for. Because a woman who is nourished in body is more open to transformation in spirit.

Your Guides

Held by women who know
the wild path

Jackie’s decades of deep transformational work with women, combined with Kaye’s extraordinary ability to motivate, create strategy and build businesses of purpose — together they create a space unlike anything else available to women in business today.

Jackie Rowe

Transformational Coach · Facilitator · Retreat Leader

Jackie has spent over two decades working with female entrepreneurs, business leaders and women navigating significant change — supporting them to reconnect with their own clarity, confidence and inner authority so they can lead with greater purpose and power. Her work sits at the intersection of mindset, strategy and deep transformational work.

Drawing on modalities including PSYCH-K®, hypnotherapy and timeline clearing work, Jackie helps women unravel the layers of pressure, expectation and conditioning that quietly limit their potential in business and life. She brings a grounded, wise presence shaped by both professional expertise and lived experience — creating environments where women slow down, get clear and move forward with real confidence and intention.

Kaye Wright-Le-Grand

Business Strategist · Founder · Mentor

With over three decades building, leading, and evolving businesses of her own while working alongside founders and leaders across Australia and internationally, Kaye’s approach has never been about success for its own sake — but about creating something meaningful, sustainable, and true to the person behind the business.

Recognised as Westpac Top 200 Business of Tomorrow and invited by Microsoft to Seattle, Kaye brings structure and direction when things feel uncertain, helping women trust their choices and inner wisdom. Through Powahaus, Le Confidant, and Maison Jade she continues to support and motivate women in business to find clarity, make aligned decisions, and move forward with confidence.

From Wild Hearts Like Yours

Words that resonate

Working with Jackie has empowered me to find my inner strength and let it shine. She is part strategist, part thought provoker and part cheerleader — with a masterful knack for knowing when to invoke these various skills to bring out clarity of purpose. She has a way of repackaging your own, sometimes confusing thoughts to create a clear mindset and meaningful direction.

— Virginia, CEO, Not For Profit

Working with Jackie Rowe has been nothing short of miraculous. Through her incredible guidance, intuitive wisdom and healing work, I was able to see the patterns that had kept me bound for so long — and finally release them. This journey has been beyond transformational. It has been liberating for my life and business, which has gone from strength to strength.

— Dee Dee, Reiki Practitioner

Your ability to provide safe spaces for women who have been in vulnerable situations is truly a gift. You are truly amazing — an amazing strong woman who really holds a wonderful space for other women without judgment. Thank you for allowing me to be vulnerable in such safe hands.

— Rickysha & Sarah Lee, Souls Rising Retreat

Kaye’s intuition and clear guidance has given us a renewed sense of confidence. Having a mentor who is dedicated and direct has encouraged us to make important business decisions which excite and motivate us after a difficult few years in the industry.

— Kylie Sherwell, Cyan Restaurant and Bar

I absolutely loved my coaching call with Kaye! She listened to my problems and gave me real, actionable steps to sort them out. She is knowledgeable, supportive and gave me so much food for thought. I cannot wait for my next session!

— Lucy Green, Berry Social

Kaye presents her specific and unique talents combined with wholesome insights and experience. She supported us from foundation to completion — a business structure that delivers confidence, honesty and relevance to today’s business environment. I highly recommend Kaye.

— Richard Jones, Strategic Aerial Visual Inspections
